payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Lit beige/tan tapered fabric lampshade with darker trim over a turned dark-wood (or wood-look) base and stepped plinth; image is slightly blurred and the lower base is partially cropped at the bottom edge, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
